summary: Review flags an incorrect concert date but provides no insight on sound or performance
review: The sole reviewer points out that the recording’s metadata appears to be wrong, asserting the show actually took place on 12/30/79. No comments are made about the audio quality or musical execution of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, negative review focused on metadata; no information to assess show or recording quality

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer only mentioned an incorrect date; no remarks on sound clarity, mix, or source type.
